Table of Contents

Interface ILine2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to the coordinates of a line segment in the form of Well Known Structures (WKS).

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A1D604A8-7914-4435-9B26-43E1EA5BAA99")]
public interface ILine2 : ILine, ICurve, IGeometry
